testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out: Given User Navigate to Navia................................................passed When User Click login with client code......................................passed And User Enter Client Code..................................................passed And User Enter Password....................................................passed And User Click Agree CheckBox...............................................passed And User Click Login button.................................................passed And User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy...........................passed And User Click Login Again..................................................passed

testcase.name: Verify Global
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User MouseOver Dashboard and Click Tools................................passed And user Mouse Over The Element.............................................passed And User Click Tools "Global"...............................................passed And User Verify Global Page.................................................passed

testcase.name: Verify Trusted Partners

testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User MouseOver Dashboard and Click Tools................................passed And user Mouse Over The Element.............................................passed And User Click Tools "Trusted Partners".....................................passed And User Scroll Down and Up.................................................passed And User Verify Shown All API Partners......................................passed And User Click Algo-Bridge Verify...........................................failed And User Click BackTesting and Verify.......................................skipped And User Click Community and Verify.........................................skipped And User Click Low Code and No Code and Verify..............................skipped And User Click Paper Trading and Verify.....................................skipped And User Click Trading and Verify...........................................skipped And User Click Other and Verify.............................................skipped
